label: In the Hall regime, global whistler instabilities grow significantly faster than ideal-MHD modes

provenance.source_span: Draft version March 19, 2026 Typeset using LATEX default style in AASTeX7.0.1 Global Non-Axisymmetric Hall Instabilities in a Rotating Plasma

strengths: Adds a concrete Hall-regime instability channel to test against Atlas-stable profiles.
weaknesses: Whistler instability evidence may apply only outside the precise Atlas parameter regime.
